waits_signals: explicit per-signal q.wait(sig,1)/q.signal(sig,1); NOT the default global timeline
thermal_note: overlap magnitude ~1.34x (warm) vs Phase-3 2.0x (cold) -- compute-bound 2-ring overlap is power/thermal-capped under sustained load; the semantics (overlap vs serialize) hold regardless
verdict: PASS: cross-ring deps correct both ways (40/40/40); independent kernels OVERLAP (2-ring 1.346x faster than 1-ring), and adding a B-waits-A dep SERIALIZES them (1.331x slower than independent) -- dependency cost appears ONLY when required. Multi-ring is schedulable safely
